ddls:
CREATE TABLE "field_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field operation */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field where the operation is performed */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., planting, fertilization, harvesting) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the operation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the operation */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator performing the operation */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the operation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the operation */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "estimated_yield" REAL /* Estimated yield from the operation */,
  "actual_yield" REAL /* Actual yield after the operation is completed */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the operation */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture level at the start of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_operations_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_operations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_field_operations_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the field (e.g., latitude and longitude coordinates) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the field in acres */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the field */,
  "irrigation_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation system used in the field */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the field */,
  "last_harvest_date" TEXT /* Date of the last harvest */,
  "next_planting_date" TEXT /* Planned date for the next planting */,
  "fertility_score" REAL /* Fertility score of the field */,
  "drainage_quality" TEXT /* Drainage quality of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation detail */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field operation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the operation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the operation */,
  "isotime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the operation */,
  "applied_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the substance was applied */,
  "control_rate" REAL /* Control rate for the operation */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop being planted or treated */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled during the operation */,
  "heading" REAL /* Heading direction during the operation */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance used */,
  "substance_amount" REAL /* Amount of substance applied */,
  "substance_type" TEXT /* Type of substance (e.g., liquid, solid) */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the operation */,
  "sensor_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor data collected during the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_details_sensor_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_details_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES field_operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop */,
  "growth_period" TEXT /* Growth period of the crop */,
  "optimal_soil_type" TEXT /* Optimal soil type for the crop */,
  "optimal_irrigation_type" TEXT /* Optimal irrigation type for the crop */,
  "yield_potential" REAL /* Potential yield of the crop variety */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Resistance of the crop to diseases */,
  "pest_resistance" TEXT /* Resistance of the crop to pests */,
  "optimal_temperature_range" TEXT /* Optimal temperature range for the crop */,
  "optimal_humidity_range" TEXT /* Optimal humidity range for the crop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., farmer, agronomist) */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the operator */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the operator */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., tractor, spreader) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the equipment was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Planned date for the next maintenance */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the equipment */,
  "fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Fuel efficiency of the equipment */,
  "operational_hours" REAL /* Total operational hours of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, agronomist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "session_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the user's session */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource being accessed (e.g., field, operation, crop) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field where the data was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of environmental data (e.g., soil moisture, temperature) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the environmental data */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., weather station, satellite) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., operation summary, crop growth, environmental analysis) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., unread, read, dismissed) */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "action_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if action is required from the user */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
